chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 313 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2314/2017. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No.2315/2017. 06.10.2025 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza, advocate for the applicant. Counsel, under instructions, does not press this reference application, which is dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
